name: Vaibhav Sharma
title: Backend / Systems Engineer
tagline: I design reliable backend systems and production-grade architecture.
summary: Systems-oriented engineer with a track record of shipping production backend systems under real-world constraints — from constraint-based scheduling engines to database migration projects. I work across the full backend stack: API design, schema modeling, service architecture, and infrastructure automation.
philosophy: Good systems are invisible. They handle edge cases silently, scale without drama, and let teams move fast without breaking things. I build for maintainability first — not for demos.

bullets: Built an end-to-end AI music generation system integrating multiple ML models for audio generation, lyric synthesis, and genre classification.
Developed a Flask-based backend API orchestrating MusicGen, GPT-based lyric models, and YAMNet embeddings.
Implemented model preloading and fallback inference paths to reduce initialization latency and improve inference reliability.
Developed UI modules for a production mobile application used by 8,000+ users.
Implemented event feed and real-time chat interface components using Flutter and Dart.
Diagnosed and resolved 18+ stability issues across two releases in collaboration with backend and design teams.
